mapper.sql: SELECT b.id, b.station_id, s.name_zh_tw AS station_name_zh_tw, b.user_id, u.username, u.email, b.created_at FROM [dbo].[user_station_bookmarks] b INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] s ON s.id = b.station_id INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = b.user_id
mapper.select:
WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( s.name_zh_tw LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[user_station_bookmarks] b INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] s ON s.id = b.station_id INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( s.name_zh_tw LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC
